title: pod system tests: clean up stray image
body:
One of the pod tests was leaving a stray image behind,
causing scary red warnings in CI logs. Clean that up.

Also, now that #13541 has merged, use 'rmi --ignore' instead of
ignoring exit status from rmi

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>

Confirmation: I've looked at all the `sys-` logs and verified that there are no red warnings; the only red output is the expected one in test 1 (Arch, OS, cgroups, etc).
